column1: # Per-cell number formats (Currency, Percent) survive /File Save →
# /File Retrieve. Regression coverage for the bug where cell formats
# set in an external xlsx (or set in l123 and saved back) rendered
# as General on reopen because the loader never read the engine's
# /FR the same file — formats should return intact.
# Currency and percent tags + rendered cell text both survive round-trip.
